script: I worked with things you can measure. Data. Models. Dashboards.
a poem finds the exact nerve no dataset ever mapped

props.quote: A poem finds the exact nerve no dataset ever mapped.

script: The lyric form is the one that admits what human experience refuses to sort

props.quote: The lyric form admits what human experience refuses to sort.

script: One used numbers. The other used metaphor. Tools different. Curiosity identical.
The best commit messages have grief in them sometimes.

lines: The best scientific papers have rhythm.
The best commit messages have grief in them.

script: Poetry was already in the server room.

props.headline: Poetry was already in the server room
props.subtext: It was never waiting for an invitation

script: You've done this a hundred times.

props.label: times you've scraped the toast over the sink

script: The grey of a commute counts. The brown of bad coffee counts.

lines: The grey of a commute counts.
The brown of bad coffee counts.
The particular blue of a Tuesday afternoon.

script: You miss how they said your name. The exact pitch of their laugh.

lines: You miss how they said your name.
The exact pitch of their laugh.

script: You miss how they said your name. The exact pitch of their laugh.

props.description: Sound-wave memory: a soft audio waveform pulses with the shape of a voice saying a name, then fragments into particles. The particles reform briefly as handwriting, a color swatch, a silhouette — specific sensory memories. Dissolves. Slow, intimate, muted palette with poetry niche gold accent.

script: Facts tell you what happened. Poetry tells you what stayed behind.
a lyric you've heard forty times that suddenly means something different

props.label: times you've heard the lyric before it landed

script: It dips its fingers in every colour because it's patient.

props.headline: It dips its fingers in every colour

script: That is not a small thing. It is the whole thing.

props.quote: It is not a small thing. It is the whole thing.
